name: io.github.Createya-ai/createya-mcp
title: Createya — AI Image & Video Generation
description: Generate images and videos via 100+ AI models (FLUX, Sora, Veo, Kling, Runway, Higgsfield, Seedance, Suno) through a single MCP server. OAuth 2.1 for Claude Desktop/claude.ai (no key needed). Bearer token for Cursor, Cline, Windsurf, Codex and other clients. No VPN required. Ruble billing. 100 free credits.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Your Createya API key: Bearer crya_sk_live_... — required for Cursor, Cline, Windsurf, Codex. Skip if using OAuth via Claude Desktop.
